text:
was a video game based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion TV series. It was released exclusively on South Korea on the 
KTF's BREW based mobile phone series on 25 May 2005 https://www.ggemguide.com/mobile_view.htm?uid=787&dpage=14&gkey=ac . It was developed by Mjoynet Co. LTD. The service is no longer available.

Overview

The game is a 2D scrolling beat-em up where the player can fight Angels on close combat or use the Pallet Rifle to defeat them from distance. It has a story mode with brief cutscenes, a time-trial and a boss mode. The enemies comes in waves and after beating them, the player advances to the next stage. The player can increase the stats for each body part of the EVA. https://archive.org/details/eva_ktf
